events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: CSST gas line not bonded. Equipment bonding scope. NEC 250.104 requires bonding of metal piping systems, including gas piping. CSST specifically often requires bonding. Not bonded is a defect/non-compliant. Rough-complete stage. Decision fail. Risk: high? CSST not bonded can lead to lightning-induced arcing and gas leaks/fire. High risk. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 80. Value 0. Confidence high.
